---
title: "Intro to Out-of-Distribution Detection"
author: 
  - name: Sharon Li
date: 2024-07-11
date-format: long
image: "../../../images/OOD.png"
categories:
  - Videos
  - ICCV
  - OOD detection
  - Trustworthy AI
---
The below tutorial from Sharon Li, an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Sciences at the University of Wisconsin-Madison, introduces a pervasive problem faced by many machine learning systems deployed in the wild — out-of-distribution data.

Out-of-distribution data, often overlooked but immensely consequential, poses a significant threat to the reliability and efficacy of machine learning models. Through Sharon's presentation, viewers gain a comprehensive understanding of this complex phenomenon and its potential ramifications on predictive accuracy.

Check out the video below to learn more about this problem and the cutting-edge methods you can equip yourself with to prevent inaccurate model predictions. 

### Sharon Li's Tutorial from ICCV 2023
Details, slides and videos from other talks at ICCV 2023: [abursuc.github.io/many-faces-reliability/](https://abursuc.github.io/many-faces-reliability/)

{{< video https://youtu.be/hgLC9_9ZCJI >}}

## Related resources
- [**Library**: PyTorch-OOD](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/Libraries/PyTorch-OOD.html): A PyTorch library for OOD detection methods discussed in this talk.
- [**Workshop**: Trustworthy AI: Explainability, Bias, Fairness, and Safety](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Learn/Workshops/TrustworthyAI_Explainability-Bias-Fairness-OODdetection.html): A hands-on workshop covering OOD detection alongside explainability, bias, and fairness.
- [**Library**: AI Fairness 360 (AIF360)](https://uw-madison-datascience.github.io/ML-X-Nexus/Toolbox/Libraries/AI-Fairness-360.html): A complementary toolkit for trustworthy AI focusing on fairness and bias detection.

## Comments
